ddls:
CREATE TABLE "landmarks" (
  "landmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landmark */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the landmark */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the landmark */,
  "z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the landmark */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the landmark */,
  "world_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the virtual world where the landmark is located */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the landmark type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the landmark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the landmark was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the landmark was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the landmark (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landmarks_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES landmark_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landmarks_world_id FOREIGN KEY ("world_id") REFERENCES virtual_worlds ("world_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "virtual_worlds" (
  "world_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each virtual world */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the virtual world */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the virtual world */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the virtual world was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the virtual world was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the virtual world (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user or team that owns the virtual world */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("world_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landmark_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landmark type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the landmark type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the landmark type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the landmark type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the landmark type was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the landmark type (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landmark_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landmark version */,
  "landmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the landmark being versioned */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the landmark version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the landmark version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the landmark version was created */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Unique version number for each version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the version is stored */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the version (if applicable) */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landmark_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landmark_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landmark_versions_landmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("landmark_id") REFERENCES landmarks ("landmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, content creator, player) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "landmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the landmark being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the landmark */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the landmark was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the landmark */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_landmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("landmark_id") REFERENCES landmarks ("landmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics event */,
  "landmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the landmark being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user triggering the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., view, click, hover) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in seconds */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the event (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_landmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("landmark_id") REFERENCES landmarks ("landmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "landmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the landmark being reported on */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, analytics) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_landmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("landmark_id") REFERENCES landmarks ("landmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted permission */,
  "landmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the landmark being accessed */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the permission (e.g., active, inactive, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_landmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("landmark_id") REFERENCES landmarks ("landmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the team was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the team (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being added to the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was added to the team */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user's team membership was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the team membership (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
